PARTIES ARE EACH TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER FOR THE COURT'S CONSIDERATION, AS WELL AS SIMULTANEOUS SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS ADDRESSING THE APPLICATION OF B & P CODE 725 (C) ON OR BEFORE AUGUST 27, 2007. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER ROMUALDO RODRIGUEZ, M.D, Petition For Writ Of Mandate IS DEEMED SUBMITTED PER COURT'S AUGUST 9, 2007 RULING. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189 =301/PJB/JF

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-09-2007 Continued To Aug-27-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Albert J. Garcia of the Law Offices of Albert J. Garcia, 510-848-5190, appearing for petitioner and moving party
Beth Faber Jacobs of the Department of Justice, 619-645-2069, appearing for respondent and opposing party

Argued and PETITIONER ROMUALDO RODRIGUEZ, M.D.'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate was continued to August 27, 2007, at which time, the matter will be deemed submitted. Parties are each to submit a proposed form of order for the Court's consideration, as well as simultaneous supplemental briefs addressing the application of B & P code 725 (C) on or before August 27, 2007. Per diem fees were assessed to the parties. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
